2263150.name: Sehoni Island: Monsters and Adventures
2263150.description:
A new island has been found and there have been reports of magic and monsters from the island, your company has sent you there to investigate, upon arriving you decide to stay in an abandoned farm and find there is much more to this island than first thoughts... the company is out for profits and maybe profit is not all...

--- Monster Breeder ---
In this game you will be able to breed your monsters and influence the outcome of their breeding with mutators. Their are x types of monsters that can be influenced through gathered or even crafted mutators. To gather the components needed to craft these mutators you can farm, forage, fish, trade and go on adventures.

The game is still in pre-alpha phase, so please be aware that some parts of the UI and the game may change again.
The PixelArt is provided by Seliel the Shaper
2263150.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
